videos.title: CYCLING IN CHIANG MAI / FIRST IMPRESSIONS!
videos.description:
I travelled to Chiangmai in Thailand for 4 weeks and took my bicycle with me, riding almost every day in and around this beautiful city. In this video I describe a little of my first week cycling here and give my fist impressions. 

I crammed in a great group ride, cycled up the local iconic hill, Doi Suthep, got mucky on the gravel trails, ate some amazing food and drank coffee... lots and lots...  and lots of coffee! 

I take a look at the local cycling culture, the temples, discuss how easy it is to meet locals, and hopefully encourage you to take a trip to Thailand and specifically ChiangMai, which is increasingly becoming known as a cycling centre. 

Amazing, fantastic, brilliant, I loved it - still am actually, got 2 weeks left!

#chiangmaicycling
#chiangmailife
#gravelbike 
#chiangmaivisit
#chiangmaitousism
